options_rewriter.notice.title: Options Rewriter
options_rewriter.notice.message: Keybindings were replaced automatically. Please restart the game before playing.
options_rewriter.notice.restart_now.tool: Exit the game normally, then restart it from your launcher before playing.
options_rewriter.notice.restart_later.to: Return to the title screen. Restart the game manually before playing.
options_rewriter.notice.restart_required: The new keybindings will take full effect after restarting.
options_rewriter.config.title: Options Rewriter Settings
options_rewriter.config.apply_mode.toolt: Notify to restart: recommended; prompts the player to restart so all keybindings apply reliably. Silent replacement: only updates the file and may not fully apply during the current session.
Shown in the confirmation dialog after the first replacement. Leave empty to use the localized default message.
options_rewriter.config.copy_options.too: Copies the instance root options.txt to config/options_rewriter/options/options.txt.
options_rewriter.config.reset_flag.toolt: Deletes applied.flag. The template will replace options.txt the next time the title screen opens.
options_rewriter.config.save.tooltip: Saves the replacement behavior and confirmation message.
options_rewriter.config.cancel.tooltip: Discards changes and returns to the mod list.
